name: Soothing Leek Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 large leek, rinsed well and sliced (about 1 cup)
1/4 cup blue cheese crumbled or Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan.
2. Add onion and leek; cook slowly, stirring often until soft.
3. Stir in broth, then add potato. Cover and cook until the potato is tender.
4. Cool mixture, then puree in a food processor or blender.
5. In another saucepan, bring cream to a gentle simmer. Cook until just slightly reduced.
6. Stir in leek mixture and heat until very hot (but do not boil). Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
7. Serve hot, sprinkling cheese over each serving. Offer a shot of white wine on the side.
Hope you enjoy this as much as we did.
